# The Chronos Crate

> The Chronos Crate is a premium temporal transport product site for customers reserving a personal-scale time relocation unit with guided destination controls, cabin stabilization, fulfillment support, and a paradox warranty.

The site presents product information, benefits, specifications, company details, shipping and fulfillment information, and return policy details for The Chronos Crate. The primary user action is reserving a unit through the checkout form on the homepage.

## Public Pages And Sections

- [Homepage](/): Product overview and checkout form for reserving The Chronos Crate.
- [Product Details](/#product-details): Detailed description of the product, core benefits, and intended use cases.
- [Specifications](/#specifications): Destination range, capacity, controls, and included materials.
- [About Us](/#about-us): Company background and product support information.
- [Return Policy](/#return-policy): Return eligibility, inspection process, and refund details.

## Site Files

- [robots.txt](/robots.txt): Crawler access instructions for the site.

## Product Summary

The Chronos Crate is positioned as a serious product offering for customers who need controlled temporal relocation, appointment recovery, historical procurement, research travel, and schedule correction. The product includes twelve era presets, manual destination year entry, a reinforced cabin, analog launch controls, and guided fulfillment.

## Checkout Context

The homepage checkout form collects reservation and fulfillment information for The Chronos Crate. Form fields include contact details, shipping details, destination year, account-style fields, quantity, and payment-style inputs.
